condition.ptxt: Only one low-beam headlight lights up

action.ptxt: Replace fuse and check for short circuit.

condition.ptxt: Both low-beam headlights do not light up

ps.ptxt: Faulty system circuit (including relays and fuses)
Faulty lighting and turn signal switch

action.ptxt: Refer to Lighting and Turn Signal Switch Inspection .

condition.ptxt: Only one high-beam headlight lights up

action.ptxt: Replace fuse and check for short circuit.

condition.ptxt: Both high-beam headlights do not light up

ps.ptxt: Faulty system circuit (including relays and fuses)
Faulty lighting and turn signal switch

action.ptxt: Refer to Lighting and Turn Signal Switch Inspection .

condition.ptxt: Front fog lights do not light up (if equipped)

ps.ptxt: Faulty system circuit (including relays and fuses)

action.ptxt: Refer to Front Fog Light Switch Inspection (If Equipped) .

condition.ptxt: Rear fog lights do not light up (if equipped)

ps.ptxt: Faulty system circuits (including relay and fuse)
Faulty lighting and turn signal switch

action.ptxt: Refer to Lighting and Turn Signal Switch Inspection .

condition.ptxt: Dome light or spot light does not light up

paragroup.ptxt: Refer to “Inspection of BCM and Its Circuits” in Section 10B.

ps.ptxt: Faulty system circuit (including relays and fuses)

action.ptxt: Refer to Front and Rear Door Switch Inspection .

condition.ptxt: Clearance lights, tail lights or license plate lights do not light up

ps.ptxt: Faulty system circuit (including relays and fuses)
Faulty lighting and turn signal switch

action.ptxt: Refer to Lighting and Turn Signal Switch Inspection .

paragroup.ptxt: Refer to “Inspection of BCM and Its Circuits” in Section 10B.

condition.ptxt: Back up lights do not light up

ps.ptxt: Faulty system circuit (including relays and fuses)

action.ptxt: Refer to Transmission Range Sensor Inspection and Adjustment .

ps.ptxt: Faulty back up light switch (M/T model)

action.ptxt: Refer to Back Up Light Switch Inspection .

condition.ptxt: Brake lights do not light up

ps.ptxt: Faulty system circuit (including relays and fuses)

action.ptxt: Refer to Brake Light Switch Inspection .

condition.ptxt: Turn signal / hazard warning lights do not flash

paragroup.ptxt: Refer to “Inspection of BCM and Its Circuits” in Section 10B.

ps.ptxt: Faulty system circuit (including relays and fuses)
Faulty lighting and turn signal switch

action.ptxt: Refer to Lighting and Turn Signal Switch Inspection .
Refer to Hazard Warning Switch Inspection .
